content.cn_text: 播音员：你将听到一些不同的录音，你需要回答你所听到的内容的问题。
content.en_text: Announcer: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what you hear.

content.cn_text: 你将有时间阅读说明和问题，并且有机会检查你的答案。
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance to check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音都只播放一次。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 测试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four sections.

content.cn_text: 请将所有答案写在听力试题册上。 测试结束时，你将有十分钟时间把答案誊写到答题卡上。
content.en_text: Write all your answers in the listening question booklet. 6 000:00:36,000 --> 00:00:44,000 At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在翻到试题册第二页的第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section one on page two of your question booklet.

content.cn_text: 第一部分。
content.en_text: Section one.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一对兄妹在电话中谈论他们父亲80岁生日派对的安排。
content.en_text: You will hear a brother and sister talking on the phone about arrangements for their father's 80th birthday party.

content.cn_text: 首先，你将有一些时间查看第二页的问题一到六。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions one to six on page two.

content.cn_text: 你将看到一个已经为你完成的例子。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example that has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 只有这一次，与此相关的对话将首先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：你好。
content.en_text: Rob: Hello.

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：你好罗伯，我是玛格丽特。
content.en_text: Margaret: Hello Rob, Margaret here.

content.cn_text: 我打电话是关于爸爸80岁生日派对的安排。
content.en_text: I'm just calling about the arrangements for dad's 80th birthday party.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：好的，我已经联系了其他家人。
content.en_text: Rob: Right, I have run around the rest of the family.

content.cn_text: 大多数人都打算来，尽管路途遥远。
content.en_text: Most people do intend to come, even though it's a long journey.

content.cn_text: 场地方面有什么进展吗？
content.en_text: Have you made any progress with the venue?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：是的，有三家酒店我们可以用来举办派对。
content.en_text: Margaret: Yes, there are three possible hotels we could use for the party.

content.cn_text: 皇家酒店、星辰酒店和温彻斯特酒店。
content.en_text: The Royal, the Star and the Winchester.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：哦，太好了。
content.en_text: Rob: Oh good.

content.cn_text: 如果我们现在能做出决定，你就可以直接在网上预订了，不是吗？
content.en_text: If we can make a decision now, you can probably book straight away on the internet, can't you?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：嗯，只有星辰酒店可以。
content.en_text: Margaret: Well, only the Star.

content.cn_text: 其他酒店我得打电话预订，不过那也没问题。
content.en_text: I'd have to make a telephone booking at the others, but that'd be okay too.

content.cn_text: 播音员：唯一接受在线预订的酒店是星辰酒店，所以字母B已经填在空格处。
content.en_text: Announcer: The only hotel that takes online bookings is the Star Hotel, so the letter B has been written in the space.

content.cn_text: 现在我们开始。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你应边听边回答问题，因为你不会听到第二次录音。
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen, because you will not hear the recording a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听并回答问题一到六。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer a questions one to six.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：你好。
content.en_text: Rob: Hello.

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：你好罗伯，我是玛格丽特。
content.en_text: Margaret: Hello Rob, Margaret here.

content.cn_text: 我打电话是关于爸爸80岁生日派对的安排。
content.en_text: I'm just calling about the arrangements for dad's 80th birthday party.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：好的，我已经联系了其他家人。
content.en_text: Rob: Right, I have run around the rest of the family.

content.cn_text: 大多数人都打算来，尽管路途遥远。
content.en_text: Most people do intend to come, even though it's a long journey.

content.cn_text: 场地方面有什么进展吗？
content.en_text: Have you made any progress with the venue?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：是的，有三家酒店我们可以用来举办派对。
content.en_text: Margaret: Yes, there are three possible hotels we could use for the party.

content.cn_text: 皇家酒店、星辰酒店和温彻斯特酒店。
content.en_text: The Royal, the Star and the Winchester.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：哦，太好了。
content.en_text: Rob: Oh good.

content.cn_text: 如果我们现在能做出决定，你就可以直接在网上预订了，不是吗？
content.en_text: If we can make a decision now, you can probably book straight away on the internet, can't you?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：嗯，只有星辰酒店可以。
content.en_text: Margaret: Well, only the Star.

content.cn_text: 其他酒店我得打电话预订，不过那也没问题。
content.en_text: I'd have to make a telephone booking at the others, but that'd be okay too.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：好的。
content.en_text: Rob: Okay.

content.cn_text: 那你觉得选哪一个？
content.en_text: So which one do you think?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：我不确定。
content.en_text: Margaret: I'm not sure.

content.cn_text: 它们都相当合适，而且地理位置都很好。
content.en_text: They're all fairly suitable, and they're in really nice locations.

content.cn_text: 星辰酒店正对着海湾。
content.en_text: The Star looks right out over the bay.

content.cn_text: 它在一个悬崖顶上。
content.en_text: It's on a cliff top.

content.cn_text: 温彻斯特酒店也在美丽的乡村里。
content.en_text: Then the Winchester is in lovely countryside too.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：是的，它在山谷里，不是吗？
content.en_text: Rob: Yes, it's in the valley, isn't it?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：是的。
content.en_text: Margaret: Yes.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：那妈妈的轮椅怎么办？
content.en_text: Rob: What about Mum's wheelchair?

content.cn_text: 她进出这些地方方便吗？
content.en_text: How easy would it be for her to get in and out of these places?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：嗯，我知道温彻斯特酒店和星辰酒店都没问题，因为我以前和她去过那里。
content.en_text: Margaret: Well, I know that the Winchester would be fine, and the Star, because I've been there with her before.

content.cn_text: 我不太确定皇家酒店，因为我记得它有很多台阶，所以我查了一下。
content.en_text: I wasn't sure about the Royal, because I seemed to remember it had a lot of steps, so I checked.

content.cn_text: 而且显然它最近安装了坡道，所以那里也没有问题了。
content.en_text: And apparently it's had ramps installed recently, so there wouldn't be any problem there either.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：哦。
content.en_text: Rob: Oh.

content.cn_text: 那孩子们呢？
content.en_text: And what about the kids?

content.cn_text: 你觉得哪个最适合他们？
content.en_text: Which one do you think would be most suitable for them?

content.cn_text: 他们有游乐区什么的吗？
content.en_text: Have they got play areas or anything?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：皇家酒店什么都没有，但温彻斯特酒店有。
content.en_text: Margaret：The Royal hasn't got anything, but the Winchester has one.

content.cn_text: 他们说，它在一楼，离餐厅不远。
content.en_text: It's on the ground floor, they said, not far from the dining room.

content.cn_text: 星辰酒店也有一个，但它不是室内的，我们不知道天气会怎么样，不是吗？
content.en_text: The Stars got one too, but it isn't undercover, and we don't know what the weather will be like, do we?

content.cn_text: 然后是生日餐本身。
content.en_text: Then there's the birthday meal itself.

content.cn_text: 皇家酒店是唯一有多种选择的。
content.en_text: The Royal's the only one where there'd be a choice.

content.cn_text: 另外两家午餐都有固定套餐。
content.en_text: The other two have a set menu at lunchtime.

content.cn_text: 话说，他们显然都提供非常好的食物，所以质量应该没问题。
content.en_text: Mind you, they all do very good food apparently, so the quality should be fine.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：我觉得有没有多样性并不重要，但我觉得我们需要有自己的房间，你觉得呢？
content.en_text: Rob: I don't think it really matters whether there's a variety or not, but I think we need to have our own room, don't you?

content.cn_text: 唯一能提供这个的是皇家酒店。
content.en_text: Margaret: The only one that can provide that is the Royal.

content.cn_text: 温彻斯特酒店和星辰酒店只有一个餐厅，所以我们只能和别的客人坐在一起，只是在餐厅的一个单独区域。
content.en_text: The Winchester and the Star only have one dining room, so we'd just be sitting with the other guests, but in a separate area of the room.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：那不太一样，是吗？
content.en_text: Rob: That's not quite the same, is it?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：是的，但另一个要考虑的是价格。
content.en_text: Margaret: No, but the other thing to consider is the price.

content.cn_text: 通常它们之间没什么区别。
content.en_text: Normally there's not much difference between them.

content.cn_text: 也许星辰酒店比其他两家稍微便宜一点，但温彻斯特酒店因为我们人多提供了相当不错的折扣。
content.en_text: Perhaps the Stars slightly cheaper than the other two, but the Winchester is offering quite a good reduction because there's so many of us.

content.cn_text: 星辰酒店和皇家酒店只会收取标准费用。
content.en_text: The Star and the Royal would just charge their standard rates.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：所以，综合考虑所有因素，你觉得我们应该选哪一个？
content.en_text: Rob: So, taking everything into consideration, which one do you think we should go for?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：温彻斯特，除非你...
content.en_text: Margaret: The Winchester, unless you...

content.cn_text: 罗伯：好的，我没意见。你显然考虑得很周全。
content.en_text: Rob: Okay, that's fine by me. You've obviously gone into everything very carefully.

content.cn_text: 播音员：在听对话的其余部分之前，你将有时间查看第三页的问题七到十。
content.en_text: Announcer: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions seven to ten on page three.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题七到十。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions seven to ten.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：到目前为止你几乎做了所有的工作，那我现在能做什么帮忙呢？
content.en_text: Rob: You've done nearly all the work so far, so what can I do now to help?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：嗯，你能管理财务吗？
content.en_text: Margaret: Well, could you manage the finances?

content.cn_text: 罗伯：当然。他们要提前付全款吗？
content.en_text: Rob: Of course. Do they want the whole amount in advance?

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：只要交定金。我会查清楚多少钱然后告诉你。
content.en_text: Margaret: Just a deposit. I'll find out how much and let you know.

content.cn_text: 那你能不能立刻把定金寄过去，以确保预订。
content.en_text: Then if you could send that straight away to secure the booking.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：好的。
content.en_text: Rob: Fine.

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：我去买些请柬。
content.en_text: Margaret：And I'll go and buy some invitations.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：哦，别这样。我来制作。我电脑上有个程序。很简单。
content.en_text: Rob: Oh, don't do that. I can produce them. I've got a program on my computer. It's easy.

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：好的，谢谢。
content.en_text: Margaret: Okay, thanks.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：然后，等我们收到回复后，我会打电话给所有要来的人，问他们是否需要交通工具。
content.en_text: Rob: Then, once we've had the replies, I'll call everyone who's coming to find out if they want transport.

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：太好了。我可以帮忙。从车站或其他地方接人。
content.en_text: Margaret: Great. I can help out with that. Pick people up from the station or whatever.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：好的。
content.en_text: Rob: Okay.

content.cn_text: 玛格丽特：哦，对了。你能强调一下爸爸不想要礼物吗？
content.en_text: Margaret: Oh, yes. And could you stress that Dad doesn't want presents?

content.cn_text: 他一直提醒我。他说他真的什么都不需要。
content.en_text: He keeps reminding me. He says there's nothing he really needs.

content.cn_text: 罗伯：好的。我会尽量劝阻他们，但你知道人们是什么样的。
content.en_text: Rob: Okay. I'll try to discourage them, but you know what people are like.

content.cn_text: 还有什么事我能做吗？
content.en_text: Anything else? Shall I do?

content.cn_text: 播音员：第一部分到此结束。你现在有半分钟时间检查你的答案。
content.en_text: Announcer: That is the end of section one. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在翻到第四页的第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section two, on page four.

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D, next to questions 1–6.
groups.title: Questions 1-6.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 7-10.

items.title: Make the 8 _____ to the Winchester Hotel
Find out who needs help with 9 _____
Tell people not to bring any 10 _____

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD ONLY for each answer.
Things to do immediately
• Send a $7$
• Make the $8$ to the Winchester Hotel
Things to do later
• Find out who needs help with $9$
• Tell people not to bring any $10$
